name: Spruce Ridge Resources Ltd.
description: Spruce Ridge Resources Ltd., now known as Homeland Nickel Inc., is a Canadian-based exploration-stage company primarily focused on the acquisition and development of mineral properties. Historically, the company has been involved in various mining projects, including nickel exploration in Oregon and copper exploration initiatives. Listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol SHL, the company continues to evaluate and manage its portfolio of resource assets to create value for shareholders through strategic geological exploration and development activities within the North American mining sector.
